odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
        

            
            
            WoodCut Pro | Odoo Optimizer
            
            
            
            
            
            
            
                tailwind.config = {
                    theme: {
                        extend: {
                            colors: {
                                wood: {
                                    50: '#efebe9', 100: '#d7ccc8', 200: '#bcaaa4', 300: '#a1887f',
                                    400: '#8d6e63', 500: '#795548', 600: '#6d4c41', 700: '#5d4037',
                                    800: '#4e342e', 900: '#3e2723',
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            
        
        
            


            
            
                window.odooProjectData = ;
            

            
                const { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } = React;

                // --- Icons ---
                const Icons = {
                    Saw: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    ArrowRight: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Maximize: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Scissors: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    FileText: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Layers: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Plus: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Calculator: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    CheckCircle: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    X: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    Layout: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    ),
                    AlertCircle: ({ className }) => (
                        
                            
                        
                    )
                };

                // --- Packing Algorithm ---
                class MaxRectsPacker {
                    constructor(width, height, kerf = 0) {
                        this.width = width;
                        this.height = height;
                        this.kerf = kerf;
                        this.freeRects = [{ x: 0, y: 0, w: width, h: height }];
                        this.packedRects = [];
                    }

                    pack(piece, allowRotation = true) {
                        let bestNode = null;
                        let bestY = Infinity;
                        let bestX = Infinity;
                        let rotate = false;

                        for (const fr of this.freeRects) {
                            if (fr.w >= piece.width && fr.h >= piece.height) {
                                if (fr.y < bestY || (fr.y === bestY && fr.x < bestX)) {
                                    bestNode = { x: fr.x, y: fr.y, w: piece.width, h: piece.height };
                                    bestY = fr.y; bestX = fr.x; rotate = false;
                                }
                            }
                            if (allowRotation && piece.width !== piece.height) {
                                if (fr.w >= piece.height && fr.h >= piece.width) {
                                    if (fr.y < bestY || (fr.y === bestY && fr.x < bestX)) {
                                        bestNode = { x: fr.x, y: fr.y, w: piece.height, h: piece.width };
                                        bestY = fr.y; bestX = fr.x; rotate = true;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        if (!bestNode) return null;

                        const usedRect = { x: bestNode.x, y: bestNode.y, w: bestNode.w + this.kerf, h: bestNode.h + this.kerf };
                        const newFreeRects = [];
                        for (const fr of this.freeRects) {
                            if (this.intersects(fr, usedRect)) {
                                if (usedRect.x + usedRect.w < fr.x + fr.w) newFreeRects.push({ x: usedRect.x + usedRect.w, y: fr.y, w: (fr.x + fr.w) - (usedRect.x + usedRect.w), h: fr.h });
                                if (usedRect.y + usedRect.h < fr.y + fr.h) newFreeRects.push({ x: fr.x, y: usedRect.y + usedRect.h, w: fr.w, h: (fr.y + fr.h) - (usedRect.y + usedRect.h) });
                                if (usedRect.x > fr.x) newFreeRects.push({ x: fr.x, y: fr.y, w: usedRect.x - fr.x, h: fr.h });
                                if (usedRect.y > fr.y) newFreeRects.push({ x: fr.x, y: fr.y, w: fr.w, h: usedRect.y - fr.y });
                            } else {
                                newFreeRects.push(fr);
                            }
                        }
                        this.freeRects = this.pruneFreeList(newFreeRects);
                        const packed = { ...piece, ...bestNode, rotated: rotate };
                        this.packedRects.push(packed);
                        return packed;
                    }

                    intersects(a, b) { return !(b.x >= a.x + a.w || b.x + b.w <= a.x || b.y >= a.y + a.h || b.y + b.h <= a.y); }

                    pruneFreeList(list) {
                        list = list.filter(r => r.w > 1 && r.h > 1);
                        for (let i = list.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            for (let j = 0; j < list.length; j++) {
                                if (i !== j && this.contains(list[j], list[i])) { list.splice(i, 1); break; }
                            }
                        }
                        return list;
                    }

                    contains(a, b) { return b.x >= a.x && b.y >= a.y && b.x + b.w <= a.x + a.w && b.y + b.h <= a.y + a.h; }
                }

                // --- UI Components ---
                const App = () => {
                    const [view, setView] = useState('optimizer');
                    const [projectName, setProjectName] = useState(window.odooProjectData?.projectName || 'New Project');
                    const [board, setBoard] = useState(window.odooProjectData?.board || { name: 'MDF 18mm', width: 244, height: 122, kerf: 0.3, quantity: 1, unit: 'cm' });
                    const [pieces, setPieces] = useState(window.odooProjectData?.pieces || []);
                    const [results, setResults] = useState(null);
                    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

                    const addPiece = () => {
                        const newPiece = { id: Math.random(), name: `Piece ${pieces.length + 1}`, width: 40, height: 20, quantity: 1, allowRotation: true, completed: false };
                        setPieces([...pieces, newPiece]);
                    };

                    const updatePiece = (id, field, value) => {
                        setPieces(pieces.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, [field]: value } : p));
                    };

                    const calculate = () => {
                        setError(null);
                        const boards = [];
                        let tempRemaining = [];
                        pieces.forEach(p => { for (let i = 0; i < p.quantity; i++) tempRemaining.push({ ...p, id: `${p.id}-${i}` }); });
                        tempRemaining.sort((a, b) => (b.width * b.height) - (a.width * a.height));

                        let boardsUsed = 0;
                        while (tempRemaining.length > 0 && boardsUsed < 20) {
                            const packer = new MaxRectsPacker(board.width, board.height, board.kerf);
                            const packed = [];
                            const nextRemaining = [];
                            for (const p of tempRemaining) {
                                const result = packer.pack(p, p.allowRotation);
                                if (result) packed.push(result); else nextRemaining.push(p);
                            }
                            boards.push({ boardIndex: boardsUsed + 1, pieces: packed, usedArea: packed.reduce((s, p) => s + p.w * p.h, 0), totalArea: board.width * board.height });
                            tempRemaining = nextRemaining;
                            boardsUsed++;
                        }
                        setResults({ boards });
                    };

                    const finishJob = () => {
                        const project_id = window.odooProjectData.id;
                        fetch('/wood_optimizer/save', {
                            method: 'POST',
                            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                            body: JSON.stringify({
                                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                                params: {
                                    project_id: project_id,
                                    pieces: pieces
                                }
                            })
                        })
                        .then(res => res.json())
                        .then(data => {
                            if (data.result?.status === 'success') {
                                alert("Project saved to Odoo!");
                            } else {
                                alert("Error saving: " + (data.result?.message || 'Unknown error'));
                            }
                        })
                        .catch(err => {
                            console.error(err);
                            alert("Failed to communicate with Odoo.");
                        });
                    };

                    return (
                        

                            
                                

                                    

                                    
WoodCut Pro | Optimizer
                                
                            

                            

                                

                                    

                                        
Project: {projectName}
                                        

                                            
Width setBoard({...board, width: e.target.value})} className="w-full border rounded p-2"/>
                                            
Height setBoard({...board, height: e.target.value})} className="w-full border rounded p-2"/>
                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        

Pieces+ Add
                                        

                                            {pieces.map(p => (
                                                

                                                     updatePiece(p.id, 'name', e.target.value)} className="w-full font-bold bg-transparent border-b mb-2 outline-none"/>
                                                    

                                                         updatePiece(p.id, 'width', parseFloat(e.target.value))} className="border rounded p-1"/>
                                                         updatePiece(p.id, 'height', parseFloat(e.target.value))} className="border rounded p-1"/>
                                                    
                                                
                                            ))}
                                        
                                        Calculate Layout
                                        Finish Job
                                    
                                

                                

                                    {results ? (
                                        

                                            {results.boards.map(b => (
                                                

                                                    
Board #{b.boardIndex}
                                                    

                                                        {b.pieces.map((p, i) => (
                                                            

                                                                {p.name}
                                                            
                                                        ))}
                                                    
                                                
                                            ))}
                                        
                                    ) : (
                                        
Calculate to see layout
                                    )}
                                
                            
                        
                    );
                };

                const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root'));
                root.render();
